evidence: Tapped a food card and the selected-food plan showed grams/day and first-week next steps.
Save completed and the saved-state actions appeared for profile, report, timeline, and progress.
Printable report opened for the saved pet and showed calories, selected food, grams/day, transition plan, and next actions.
Timeline opened for the same saved pet and showed the current plan and progress context.
Same saved pet returned to progress mode without restarting intake.
